Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class VoiceCall

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.VoiceCall
public class VoiceCall extends SObject

Java class for VoiceCall complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="VoiceCall">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Activity" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Task" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActivityId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AttachedContentDocuments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CallAcceptDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CallCenter" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}CallCenter" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CallCenterId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CallConnectDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CallDisposition" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CallDurationInSeconds" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CallEndDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CallOrigin" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CallQueuedDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CallRecording" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}VoiceCallRecording" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CallRecordingId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CallResolution" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CallStartDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CallType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Caller" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ConversationParticipant" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CallerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CallerIdType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CombinedAttachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConferenceKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentDocumentLinks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Conversation" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Conversation" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConversationEntries" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConversationId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CurrencyCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CustomerHoldDuration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EndUser" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}MessagingEndUser" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EndUserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FeedSubscriptionsForEntity" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Feeds" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FromPhoneNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsRecorded" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastReferencedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastViewedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LongestHoldDuration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MediaProvider" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}CallCoachingMediaProvider" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MediaProviderId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NextCall" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}VoiceCall" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NextCallId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NumberOfHolds" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Owner" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OwnerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PreviousCall" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}VoiceCall" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PreviousCallId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Price" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="QualityScore" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="QueueName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Recipient" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ConversationParticipant" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecipientId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordActionHistories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordActions" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RelatedRecord" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RelatedRecordId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Shares" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SourceType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ToPhoneNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="User" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="VendorCallKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="VendorParentCallKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="VendorType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
